description_long: This projector features a compact, cylindrical body with a smooth, light gray exterior and a prominent circular lens on one side. The front face is dominated by a large, dark mesh grill, likely serving as a ventilation or speaker area, while the opposite side has a similar but slightly recessed grill. A small, vertical cylindrical protrusion on the top suggests a mounting or adjustment mechanism. Black accent details, including a ribbed section and a few small panels, add contrast to the otherwise uniform surface. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear attention to airflow and heat dissipation.
description: A compact, cylindrical projector with a large mesh grill, circular lens, and modern gray-and-black finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular lens and a ribbed black accent above it.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by a large, dark mesh grill and a small brand logo above it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a smooth surface and black accent, no visible lens.
description_view_3: Rear view with a recessed mesh grill and a small black panel on the side.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, gray logo is visible above the front mesh grill, centered on the body. The brand name appears to be 'ilumi', rendered in a simple, modern font.
attribute_lens_type: fixed lens; circular, medium-sized, with a black accent ring and no visible adjustment rings.
attribute_control_panel_design: A ribbed black control dial is located on the top side of the projector, likely for power or input selection. No other buttons or touch controls are visible.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Large, circular mesh grills are present on both the front and rear faces, providing ample ventilation. The mesh consists of fine perforations arranged in a dense, uniform pattern.
